subject: Status review: guppy milestone in Auckland | Albert Einstein | Q4 review | INIT-6497
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of guppy work in Auckland. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Prepare a fallback plan if integration testing slips beyond schedule. Comparative note includes Albert Einstein and Albert Einstein as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-6497. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, coordination.
